name: Market Research Template
description: Market Research Template - Marketing template for research professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template 1. Research Brief Start by completing the Research Brief tab. Define your project name, objectives, research questions, and methodology. 2. Market Overview Document the market landscape, including TAM/SAM/SOM, key trends, and major players. 3. Collect Insights Use the Customer Insights tab to organize qualitative findings from various sources (surveys, interviews, focus groups, analytics). 4. Competitive Analysis Analyze competitors systematically using the Competitor Analysis tab. Track their positioning, strengths, weaknesses, and threat level. 5. Survey Results Docu
